name: Feature request

## Problem

<!-- What user pain point does this address? Link to research or user feedback if available. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should the feature do? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one better? -->

## Alignment check (from feature-spec.md principles)

- [ ] Supports **Living Plan** (not Static Calculator)
- [ ] Respects **Trust** principle (no custody, no bait pricing, local-first)
- [ ] Fits **Boring but robust > Feature breadth** (not scope creep)
- [ ] Does not touch user's actual money

## Tier & priority

- [ ] Tier 1 (MVP core)
- [ ] Tier 2 (Post-MVP power)
- [ ] Tier 3 (Future — with explicit user demand)

## User impact

<!-- How many users affected? How often? -->

## Dependencies

<!-- Does this depend on other features, design work, or external changes? -->

## Success metric

<!-- How will we know this feature succeeds? -->
